security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; script-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.longDescription: Vellum is a desktop OSINT studio with a magazine-grade interface, an encrypted local vault, an entity graph, an append-only forensic ledger, and chain-of-custody PDF reports.
